landing.subtitle: Musée-Crosdale is a synthetic museum for vaulted culture, powered by the Facinations fine‑art protocol. Choose your role.

landing.role_artists_desc: Mint, vault, and circulate your collections inside Facinations.
landing.role_partners_desc: Learn the story and strategy behind Facinations at the Blogazine.

about.title: About Facinations
about.lead: Facinations is a fine art–first platform for cultural capital. It fractionalizes museum-grade works into programmable vaults and turns provenance into a liquid, composable financial primitive.
about.why_body: The global fine art market is large, illiquid, and structurally opaque. Facinations introduces a protocol layer that unlocks secondary liquidity while preserving the discretion and prestige of traditional art markets.
about.how_gallery: Gallery — discovery of curated works and civilization narratives.
about.how_exchange: Collection & Exchange — private, fine art–native secondary market.
about.how_vaults: Vaults — institutional-grade custody and provenance memory layer.
about.team_body: Facinations is built by a team at the intersection of fine art, blockchain protocol design, and narrative systems, with experience across galleries, DeFi, and cultural production.
about.body: Facinations is a DeFi-native fine art vault, enabling fractional ownership of rare artworks through secure on-chain vaults.

kyc.title: Identity Verification
kyc.details_body: Enter your details exactly as they appear on your identity document.
kyc.doc_body: Choose the type of government-issued ID you'll be submitting.
kyc.upload_body: Upload a clear photo or scan of your {{documentType}}. Files are encrypted in transit and never stored beyond verification.
kyc.upload_hint: JPG, PNG, or PDF · Max 10 MB
kyc.upload_security: 256-bit encryption · GDPR compliant · Data deleted after verification
kyc.confirm_body: Your documents are being reviewed. This typically takes under 5 minutes. You'll receive confirmation and can then access all platform features.
kyc.footer_note: KYC verification is required under applicable financial regulations. See our Privacy Policy for details on data handling.
kyc.verified_body: Your KYC verification is complete. You can now access all platform features.

kycGate.pending_body: Your identity verification is being reviewed. This usually takes under 5 minutes. You'll be able to access {{feature}} once approved.
kycGate.failed_body: We were unable to verify your identity. Please check your documents and try again. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
kycGate.idle_body: Your region requires KYC verification before accessing {{feature}}. The process takes under 2 minutes and uses secure document verification.

legal.body: Facinations provides tools for digital presentation and provenance tracking. Ownership, intellectual property rights, and legal obligations remain the responsibility of their respective holders.
legal.body2: All content is provided as-is and subject to applicable laws governing digital assets, intellectual property, and decentralized technologies.

whitepaper.title: Façinations
whitepaper.intro: A Decentralised Protocol for On-Chain Provenance, Fractional Vault Ownership & Cultural Asset Governance.
whitepaper.s1_p1: Façinations is a decentralised protocol for the curation, fractional ownership, and on-chain provenance of fine-art assets. Built on Ethereum, the protocol combines ERC-721 tokens with ERC-1155 fractional vault mechanics, role-based access control, and a geospatial civilisation-layer oracle.
whitepaper.s1_p2: This whitepaper describes the technical architecture, token economics, governance model, and roadmap — targeting galleries, institutional collectors, independent artists, and DeFi-native investors.
whitepaper.s1_disclaimer: This document describes protocol mechanics and does not constitute financial or investment advice. All contract addresses reference the Sepolia testnet deployment as of v1.0.
whitepaper.s2_1_p: The global fine-art market exceeds USD 65 billion annually yet remains characterised by information asymmetry, opaque provenance chains, and restricted access.
whitepaper.s2_2_p: High-value artworks are illiquid by nature. No standardised mechanism exists for fractional participation, preventing retail investors from accessing this asset class.
whitepaper.s2_3_p: Existing blockchain art solutions capture digital metadata but ignore the physical-world dimension. The cultural geography of an artwork is a material determinant of value.
whitepaper.s3_1_p1: Every artwork is represented as an ERC-721 token minted through FacinationsNFT. The token URI points to structured JSON metadata on IPFS: artist identity, creation coordinates, exhibition history, legal-pack hash, and appraiser signatures.
whitepaper.s3_1_p2: Role-based access control restricts minting to addresses holding MINTER_ROLE, ensuring only verified gallery partners and institutions may register new works.
whitepaper.s3_2_p1: The owner may deposit an NFT into a FractionalVault contract. The vault locks the ERC-721 and issues ERC-1155 share tokens (FAC). Share-holders receive rental income, resale proceeds, and governance weight.
whitepaper.s3_2_p2: The VaultRegistry maintains an on-chain index of all active vaults, enabling composable queries by The Graph subgraph and external DeFi protocols.
whitepaper.s3_3_p: FAC vault shares are tradeable on Swapp, a bonding-curve AMM seeded by a Chainlink oracle ingesting auction-house data feeds to establish a fair-value floor.
whitepaper.s3_4_p: The CivMap oracle encodes geospatial provenance on-chain. Each NFT carries a geoHash from its physical origin. Aggregate distributions power a live civilisation heat-map in the Gallery UI.
whitepaper.s4_1_p: XER is the protocol utility token. Holding XER above the XERPremiumGate threshold grants institutional features: bulk vault creation, priority minting, and reduced Swapp fees. Supply is non-inflationary post-launch.
whitepaper.s4_2_p: FAC tokens are per-vault ERC-1155 units with fixed supply. Holders vote on vault governance: reserve price, exhibition licensing, insurance.
whitepaper.s4_3_p: Protocol fees in ETH: 0.5% on primary mint, 1.0% on vault creation, 0.3% on Swapp trades. Fees flow to a multi-sig treasury governed by XER holders.
whitepaper.s5_1_p: Protocol governance is exercised through a DAO where voting weight is proportional to XER holdings. Proposals require a 3-day voting period and 10% quorum, executing via a 48-hour time-lock.
whitepaper.s5_2_p: Each FractionalVault has an independent governance module. FAC holders vote on reserve price, exhibition licensing, and insurance. Simple majority required.
whitepaper.s6_1_p: ERC-721 minting live on Sepolia. Role-based access operational. Gallery, Studio, Vault, and Swap UI deployed. Localisation across 12 languages.
whitepaper.s6_2_p: Deploy to Ethereum mainnet. Launch Swapp AMM with Chainlink integration. Deploy The Graph subgraph. Activate XERPremiumGate.
whitepaper.s6_3_p: Activate geospatial provenance encoding. Deploy CivMap oracle and Gallery heat-map. Launch DAO with XER-weighted voting.
whitepaper.s6_4_p: Bridge FAC shares to Polygon and Base. Partner with regulated custodians. Explore L2 deployment for high-volume minting.
whitepaper.s7_1_p1: FacinationsNFT inherits OpenZeppelin ERC721URIStorage and AccessControl, both extensively audited. Minting is gated behind MINTER_ROLE with no public mint function.
whitepaper.s7_1_p2: FractionalVault contracts will undergo independent security audit prior to mainnet. Multi-sig treasury requires 3-of-5 threshold from core contributors.
whitepaper.s7_1_warning: Testnet contracts are for demonstration only. Do not send real assets to testnet addresses.
whitepaper.s7_2_p1: Façinations addresses the absence of transparent, liquid, and geographically-aware ownership infrastructure for cultural assets. ERC-721 provenance tokens, ERC-1155 fractional vaults, CivMap, and DAO governance create a sovereign layer for fine art on the open web.
whitepaper.s7_2_p2: The protocol is open, composable, and designed for long-term institutional adoption. Partners, galleries, and developers are invited to engage with the testnet ahead of mainnet launch.
whitepaper.page_subtitle: A decentralised system for custody, exchange, and provenance of museum-grade digital fine art on Ethereum.
whitepaper.page_body1: The Facinations protocol introduces a layered market structure: gallery discovery, collector collections, curated exchanges, and vault-grade custody. Each layer writes to a shared provenance graph that captures cultural gravity, not just price.
whitepaper.page_body2: For the full technical specification, download the PDF whitepaper or inspect the open-source smart contracts that anchor custody, liquidity, and provenance to Ethereum.

partner.meta_description: Facinations affiliate and consultant partner programme.
partner.heading: Consultant Portal
partner.subtitle: Earn commission referring collectors, dealers, and institutions to the Facinations protocol.
partner.how_body: Apply below to receive your unique referral link. Share it with collectors, gallery owners, or DeFi traders. When a referred user completes KYC and places their first trade, commission begins accruing. Paid monthly in USD via ACH, PayPal, or USDC — minimum threshold $50.
partner.terms_body: 90-day attribution window · 12-month earning window · First-click attribution · 30-day cookie — Governed by the laws of the State of New York, United States.

marketing.heading: Partner Resources
marketing.payment_schedule: Payment schedule: Monthly within 15 business days of month-end. Minimum payout $50 (rolls to next month if below threshold). Methods: ACH/Wire, PayPal, or USDC. Currency: USD.
